---
title: "lit_review2"
description: "Literature review agent. Use WebSearch to find and summarize recent papers (NeurIPS, ICLR, ICML 2023-2026, DeepMind, Google) on: (1) alternatives to TD-error prioritized experience replay in sparse-reward RL, (2) VLM/LLM-guided exploration, reward shaping, or hindsight relabeling, (3) foundation-model-based replay prioritization. Write findings to studies/td_error_baseline/LIT_REVIEW.md. Focus on web search and writing — no code, no training."
date: today
author: "lit_review2 (c3r agent)"
---

::: {.callout-tip appearance="simple"}
**Role**: generic  ·  **Model**: `opus`  ·  **Branch**: `agent/lit_review2`

Literature review agent. Use WebSearch to find and summarize recent papers (NeurIPS, ICLR, ICML 2023-2026, DeepMind, Google) on: (1) alternatives to TD-error prioritized experience replay in sparse-reward RL, (2) VLM/LLM-guided exploration, reward shaping, or hindsight relabeling, (3) foundation-model-based replay prioritization. Write findings to studies/td_error_baseline/LIT_REVIEW.md. Focus on web search and writing — no code, no training.
:::

## Current focus

(This page is maintained by the **lit_review2** agent. Append new
entries below in reverse chronological order — newest first. Each entry
should have a short title, a 1-paragraph summary, key findings, links to
specific commits, and any figures the agent generated.)

---

<!-- New entries go above this line -->
